description_long: This street light features a tall, slender pole with a smooth, slightly tapered cylindrical form and a single, gently curved arm extending from the top. The arm supports an elongated, oval-shaped lamp head, which is streamlined and modern in appearance, likely housing an LED or similar light source. The lamp head is angled downward, optimizing illumination for streets or sidewalks below. The pole appears to be constructed from metal, likely steel or aluminum, with a uniform matte gray finish and no visible decorative elements. The overall design is minimalist and functional, suitable for contemporary urban environments. There are no visible access panels, control boxes, or additional fixtures attached to the pole.
description: A tall, minimalist street light with a smooth, tapered pole and a single curved arm supporting a modern, oval lamp head angled downward. The design is sleek and functional, finished in matte gray.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full height of the pole and the gentle curve of the arm with the lamp head extending outward.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the narrow profile of the pole and the lamp head, with the arm and lamp head appearing as a thin line.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring view 0, showing the pole and the curved arm with the lamp head extending in the opposite direction.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the pole's narrowest profile and the lamp head aligned with the pole, with minimal visible arm curvature.
attribute_lamp_head_design: Modern, elongated oval lamp head with a streamlined, minimalist appearance and no visible decorative elements or diffusers.
